metadata.siteTitle: BitByBit Cursá — Pay in sats, settle in pesos
metadata.description: Lightning checkout for Argentine educators. Sell classes and study material in sats, and receive pesos to your CBU.
metadata.ogHeadline: Pay in sats, settle in pesos
metadata.ogTagline: Lightning checkout for schools, tutors, and academies in Argentina.

comingSoon.tagline: Buy your next class with sats.
comingSoon.body: We're building the Lightning checkout for schools, tutors, and academies. Coming soon.

hero.title: Buy your next class with <gradient>sats</gradient>.
hero.subtitle: Pay for classes, workshops, and study material with your Lightning wallet. The teacher gets paid in pesos, straight to their CBU.

highlighted.title: Highlighted courses
highlighted.subtitle: A taste of what the community is teaching today. Soon, courses will rise to the top based on reactions they earn on Nostr.

motivation.title: Need motivation?
motivation.subtitle: Turn your course into more than just classes. Challenge others or weave it into your daily routine.
motivation.arenaTitle: Turn your course into a challenge
motivation.arenaDescription: Create an arena, challenge other students, and share your progress. Consistency, measured and celebrated.
motivation.habitsTitle: Turn your learning into a habit
motivation.habitsDescription: Study your course a little every day. Habits helps you keep the streak with reminders and stats.

companions.title: Travel companions
companions.subtitle:
Projects and communities we admire,
builders of open infrastructure for a freer future.
companions.wapuDescription: Lightning settlement to CBU/alias in Argentina.
companions.laCryptaDescription: Bitcoin community in Argentina, host of Hackathon #3.
companions.mappingBitcoinDescription: Find every place in the Bitcoin ecosystem.
companions.laWalletDescription: Bitcoin and Lightning wallet on Nostr.

support.title: Support Cursá
support.subtitle: Open source and community-driven. Help us keep building.
support.zapAriaLabel: Send a Lightning zap to the developers
support.orContribute: Or contribute to a specific project

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: We're putting this section together. The most common questions about Cursá will live here soon.

hero.title: Buy your next class with sats.
hero.subtitle: Pay for classes, workshops, and study material with your Lightning wallet. The teacher gets paid in pesos, straight to their CBU.

list.heading: Available now
list.empty: No classes or materials published yet. Check back soon.

type.code: You receive a redemption code as soon as you pay.

checkout.title: Pay for your order
checkout.instructions: Scan the QR with your Lightning wallet, or copy the invoice and paste it into your payment app.
checkout.expired: This invoice has expired. Go back to the offering and generate a new one.

status.paid: Payment received! Taking you to the receipt…
status.failed: We could not confirm the payment. Try again.

receipt.title: All set! Your purchase is confirmed.
receipt.subtitle: Save this page: it's your permanent receipt.

code.label: Redemption code
code.pending: Your code is being assigned. Reload this page in a few seconds.

download.label: Your download
download.missing: Your download isn't ready yet. Try reloading in a few minutes.

pending.title: Your payment is processing
pending.body: We're still waiting on Wapu's confirmation. This page will refresh automatically.

nostrPrompt.title: Want to save this order to your Nostr?
nostrPrompt.body: Connecting your Nostr identity lets you see this receipt from any device and receive the code by DM.

errors.offeringUnavailable: This offering is no longer available.
errors.checkoutFailed: We could not create the invoice. Try again in a moment.
errors.network: Connection failed. Check your network and try again.
errors.notFound: We couldn't find what you were looking for.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Your key metrics today.
overview.paidHint: Orders confirmed in the last 30 days.

offerings.title: Offerings
offerings.subtitle: Catalog of courses and materials you sell.
offerings.emptyActive: You haven't created any offerings yet.

create.title: New offering
create.subtitle: Set the details so the offering shows up in your storefront.

form.slugHint: URL identifier. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
form.typeCodeHint: Buyer receives one code from the pool when they pay.
form.typeDownloadHint: Buyer downloads a file after payment.
form.title: Title
form.priceSatsHint: Leave empty to compute the sats price at purchase time.

imageUpload.pasteUrlInstead: Already hosting it elsewhere? Paste the URL.
imageUpload.hint: JPG, PNG, or WebP up to 5 MB. The image is uploaded to Blossom with your Nostr signature.
imageUpload.errorBadType: Only JPG, PNG, and WebP are accepted.
imageUpload.errorUploadFailed: Couldn't upload the image. Try again.
imageUpload.errorCancelled: You cancelled the signature. The image wasn't uploaded.
imageUpload.errorNoServers: No Blossom servers configured. Tell the deployer.

form.codePoolHint: One code per line. Each purchase consumes one; when the pool is empty, new buyers see "code pending" until you add more.
form.downloadUrlHint: Where the file is hosted. We serve it through an access-controlled proxy.
form.saveFailed: Couldn't save the offering. Try again.
form.slugTaken: An offering with that slug already exists.
form.invalidPriceArs: ARS price must be a positive integer.
form.invalidPriceSats: Sats price must be a positive integer.
form.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive this offering? It will stop appearing in the storefront.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Order history for your storefront. Read-only in v1.

detail.title: Order detail
detail.readOnlyHint: Orders are read-only in v1: no refunds, no resends, no manual delivery flagging.

students.title: Students
students.subtitle: Buyers with an attached Nostr identity.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Payout details and storefront options.
settings.warningBody: The CBU/alias here decides where your payouts land. Double-check the values before saving.

form.payoutHint: Wapu deposits the ARS into this CBU or alias. You need at least one.
form.autorenewalHint: Show the auto-renewal option at checkout. When off, the code path is deployed but dormant.
form.destinationRequired: You need at least a CBU or an alias.
form.signRequiredTitle: Confirm the change with your signature
form.signRequiredBody: Changing the CBU or alias requires an additional signature from your Nostr signer.
form.signCancelled: You cancelled the signature. Try again when you're ready.
form.signClockSkew: Your device clock is out of sync. Sync it and try again.

account.title: My orders
account.subtitle: Orders associated with this Nostr identity.
account.empty: No orders on this identity yet.

claim.title: Claim this order
claim.subtitle: Attach this purchase to your Nostr identity so it shows up under "My orders".

alreadyClaimed.title: This order is already claimed
alreadyClaimed.body: Another identity already attached this purchase. If you think this is a mistake, contact us.
alreadyClaimed.toast: Another identity already claimed this order.

login.title: Sign in with Nostr
login.subtitle: Connect your identity to save your orders and receive codes by DM. Accounts are optional — you can also buy without signing in.
login.extensionDescription: Sign with your Nostr extension (Alby, nos2x).
login.nsecDescription: Paste your private key (nsec). Only used in this browser.
login.nsecWarning: Your private key should never leave your device. Only paste it on trusted sites, and consider using a Nostr extension instead.
login.nsecAcceptRisk: I understand the risk and want to paste my key in this browser.
login.no_extension: No Nostr extension detected in this browser.
login.nostr_signing_rejected: You cancelled the signature. Try again whenever you're ready.
login.nsecInvalidKey: That doesn't look like a valid key. Check the format (nsec1… or 64 hex chars).
login.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
login.error: We could not sign you in. Try again in a moment.
login.createdIntro: We generated a new Nostr key for you. Save it before you continue — without it you cannot sign back in.
login.createdWarning: If you lose this key, you lose access to your account. Don't share it with anyone.
login.createdAckLabel: I saved my key somewhere safe.
login.connectDescription: Use Nostr Connect (NIP-46) with apps like nsec.app or Amber.
login.connectScanTitle: Scan this code with your Nostr signer
login.connectSlowHint: If your signer hasn't responded, try pasting a bunker:// URL below.
login.connectQrAlt: QR code to connect your Nostr signer
login.connectApproveInSigner: Approve the connection in your signer
login.connectCompatible: Compatible with nsec.app, Amber, and other NIP-46 signers.
login.connectError: We couldn't connect to your signer. Try again.
login.connectInvalidBunker: That bunker:// URL doesn't look valid.

reSignIn.mismatch: That key doesn't match your current session.

storefront.empty: This professor hasn't published any offerings yet.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Cursá
onboarding.subtitle: Pick a name, a store handle, and start selling.

form.slugHint: Used in your public URL: cursa.bitbybit.com.ar/m/{your-slug}. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
form.slugTaken: That handle is taken. Try another.

slugErrors.format: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only (and no leading or trailing hyphens).
slugErrors.reserved: That handle is reserved by the platform. Pick another.

form.displayNameTooShort: Display name needs at least 2 characters.
form.bioPlaceholder: A line or two about what you teach.
form.destination: Bank alias or CBU for payouts
form.destinationHint: Optional now. Add it from Settings before your first sale — without it, checkout will reject buyers.
form.destinationInvalid: Alias is 6–20 characters (letters, numbers, dots, hyphens). CBU is exactly 22 digits.
form.saveFailed: Couldn't create the store. Try again.
form.alreadyClaimed: You already have a store on this identity.
